---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the decision-quality core
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What decision-quality, planning, explanation, learning, or safety problem would
this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful version.

## Why now?

Explain why this belongs before deferred areas such as voice, dashboards,
Telegram, browser automation, daemon behavior, or autonomous editing.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The behavior is testable.
- [ ] CLI output stays honest about what is real, simulated, or deferred.
- [ ] Docs are updated if public commands or concepts change.

## Alternatives

What simpler approach did you consider?
